hero.name: Aman Garg
hero.tagline: "Aspiring Data Science Engineer pulling insights from complex data."

about.education: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering at Lovely Professional University.
about.description:
Aspiring Data Science Engineer with a strong interest in Data Science, Machine Learning, and Data Structures. I have hands-on experience in C++ and Python, along with practical knowledge of tools like NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib for data analysis and visualization. I enjoy working with data to discover patterns, gain insights, and build predictive models for real-world problems.

I have developed projects such as sales analysis dashboards and machine learning-based prediction systems, where I applied my skills to create data-driven solutions. I also have basic knowledge of JavaScript and Node.js, which helps me build simple web-based applications.

I am continuously improving my problem-solving skills through Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) and aim to build impactful and scalable solutions in the field of Data Science.

experience.title: Matriculation
experience.company: Sarvodaya Public School, Meerut, Uttar Pradesh

projects.title: Offline and Online Sales Dashboard
projects.description: Streamlined 5,000+ sales transactions to evaluate performance metrics for digital platforms versus physical retail store locations. Constructed a comprehensive Power BI interface using 50+ DAX measures to track monthly growth and profitability. Optimized 150+ operational workflows by identifying high-revenue periods and allocating marketing resources more effectively during seasons.

projects.title: Bank Marketing Campaign Prediction
projects.description: Built predictive models forecasting bank term deposit subscriptions. Implemented Python and Scikit-learn to compare classification models for optimal accuracy, and deployed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time predictions.

projects.title: Bike Sales Analysis and Resale Price Prediction
projects.description: Explored 10K+ Indian bike sales records for regional resale value trends. Conducted preprocessing, feature engineering, and produced 14+ visual insights. Developed a Linear Regression model (MSE = 0.05) to accurately predict resale prices.

projects.title: Crime Report Analysis Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive Excel dashboard analyzing crime records. Features detailed breakdown of crime hotspots, severity analysis, and temporal trends using Pivot Tables and dynamic charts.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: Created a responsive weather tracking web app offering real-time updates and 5-day forecasts globally. Designed a modern UI and integrated Weather API for live, precise data, improving accuracy by 95%.

achievements.title: LeetCode 50 Days Badge
achievements.description: Consistently active for 50 days to earn the LeetCode 50 Days badge.
